name: Goat Brute
description: Heavy tank enemy. Slow, high HP, devastating melee. Appears from Circle 2 onward.

textToImageTask.prompt: A massive bipedal humanoid goat demon in A-pose, heavily muscular like a minotaur, thick black fur, enormous spiral horns, wielding a huge two-handed war hammer, heavy iron plate armor on shoulders and chest, thick digitigrade goat legs, towering intimidating presence, stylized dark fantasy game character, full body front view, dark background

textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Massive bipedal goat demon tank, minotaur build, black fur, spiral horns, two-handed war hammer, iron plate armor, A-pose

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: Thick black fur, battered dark iron plate armor, massive stone war hammer, deep red eyes, scarred hide
